title: I just noticed
wikitext:
[]: I just noticed             Quote Post by ZeroFive1 » Sat Jul 29, 2006 2:43 pm You know, the pilots fill their lungs with LCL. So, what do they do after a battle? Barf it all up?

[]:             Quote Post by BrikHaus » Sat Jul 29, 2006 4:12 pm Probably. Either that or it absorbs into their blood stream.

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Sat Jul 29, 2006 5:00 pm Umm Exhale then get out?

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sat Jul 29, 2006 5:19 pm LCL seems to have the narrativium-driven property of not behaving like a liquid when it would get in the way if it were - really, Shinji's introduction should have been a little more like this: Shin Kakumei Evangelion ep#4 wrote: Ritsuko: Begin LCL induction. Back to Utena in the Entry Plug. Utena: What? She looks down to see the Entry Plug filling with a yellow-orange liquid. Juri (off- seen on the Eva display): Don't worry. Your lungs will take oxygen from it. It's just a little odd on the way down. The LCL surrounds Utena, who raises a skeptical eyebrow as it goes over her head. Utena's lungs fill with the liquid, and she suddenly looks very ill. Utena: That wasn't much fun. Will I have to go through this every time I sit in this chair? Juri (off- seen on the Eva display): Heh. It's twice as much fun on the way back up, Utena-san.
summary:

Article: I just noticed
[]: I just noticed             Quote Post by ZeroFive1 » Sat Jul 29, 2006 2:43 pm You know, the pilots fill their lungs with LCL. So, what do they do after a battle? Barf it all up?

[]:             Quote Post by BrikHaus » Sat Jul 29, 2006 4:12 pm Probably. Either that or it absorbs into their blood stream.

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Sat Jul 29, 2006 5:00 pm Umm Exhale then get out?

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sat Jul 29, 2006 5:19 pm LCL seems to have the narrativium-driven property of not behaving like a liquid when it would get in the way if it were - really, Shinji's introduction should have been a little more like this: Shin Kakumei Evangelion ep#4 wrote: Ritsuko: Begin LCL induction. Back to Utena in the Entry Plug. Utena: What? She looks down to see the Entry Plug filling with a yellow-orange liquid. Juri (off- seen on the Eva display): Don't worry. Your lungs will take oxygen from it. It's just a little odd on the way down. The LCL surrounds Utena, who raises a skeptical eyebrow as it goes over her head. Utena's lungs fill with the liquid, and she suddenly looks very ill. Utena: That wasn't much fun. Will I have to go through this every time I sit in this chair? Juri (off- seen on the Eva display): Heh. It's twice as much fun on the way back up, Utena-san.
